'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=7hkBs946bmolgEGZG3eSQmsOVhM5_8DCfhI83S3Uguo-1772984500-1.0.1.1-9QuUiyM3EQGHXRR8uCj92xBQ4Kmhr0PGP1tqT8WXbaM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
